case_title: YUNT, JEFFREY W. VS CASTILLO, LOUIS

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YUNT, JEFFREY W. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTILLO, LOUIS $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 INTEREST, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,780.00, DEFT HAS AGREED TO PAY PLTF $1000 ON 4/1/94 AND $600 PLUS INTERES AND COST ON MAY 1, 1994 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY YUNT, JEFFREY W. AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, LOUIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
CERTIFIED MAIL TO DEF.LOUIS CASTILLO RETURNED SIGNED.
